name: A Trip to Mars RPG
description:
Mars is the fourth planet of the solar system as well as the second smallest planet. As of right now, humans can't live on Mars yet because of its harsh environment, a lack of breathable oxygen, extreme cold, dangerous radiation, and low atmospheric pressure. Once again, this is pure fiction so it is possible.

What you do here depends on your actions, whether you came alone or with some company.
creator: SailorMoonFan2001
